objective: Add first-class parent/child orchestration after the oversight loop proved itself.
stop_reason: Native child runs, bounded wait/status checks, structured evidence retrieval, and parent slice history are implemented and verified.

parent_child_run_links.details: runs now persist parent_run_id, parent_slice_id, and oversight_state.

parent_slice_history.details: Parent runs append slice records to oversight_state when child runs are created.

focused_tests.command: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_run_schemas.py tests/unit/test_mcp_tool_definitions.py tests/unit/mcp/test_phase_filtering.py tests/integration/test_oversight_orchestration.py tests/integration/test_mcp_tools.py tests/integration/test_mcp_server.py tests/integration/test_mcp.py tests/integration/test_api_full_lifecycle.py -q

migration.command: uv run alembic -c alembic.ini upgrade head

open_uncertainties: Phase 5 v1 exposes native orchestration primitives, but does not yet add a dedicated UI for oversight trees.
Review artifacts are promoted through the structured evidence endpoint first; a durable review-artifact table remains a future enhancement if needed.
